title: gladiolus pardalinus
intro: Gladiolus pardalinus, commonly known as the leopard orchid or gladiolus, is a species of cormous perennial plant in the family Iridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, as it is traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of gladiolus pardalinus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and act as an antibacterial agent. The herbal preparations of gladiolus pardalinus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are typically used in folk medicine to treat a range of conditions.
